retrieved_result: Welcome Home Gamaliel Welcome Thank you for searching for Gamaliel Shooting Supply. Gamaliel's retail store in Gamaliel, Kentucky, is still OPEN FOR BUSINESS. However, Gamaliel.com has merged with Brownells.com. To continue shopping for your hunting, shooting or other outdoor needs, click on any of the link
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result describes a physical hunting/shooting retailer and a site merge with Brownells, not any information about debugging API integration; content is unrelated to the query.
